searchDocs.title: declare​
searchDocs.content: </> GroupInfobox.declare(frame: frame) → string Declares the 'Studio' schema as a Cargo table. Only to be invoked via Template:GroupInfobox.

searchDocs.title: store​
searchDocs.content: </> GroupInfobox.store( frame: frame, data: {} ) → string Stores data to the schema

searchDocs.title: main​
searchDocs.content: invoked </> GroupInfobox.main(frame: frame) → string Renders and returns the infobox HTML as a string.
